title: Fixed size string concatenation with integer results in fixed size string of size 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, fixed_str CHAR(5), num_val INT);
INSERT INTO test_strings (fixed_str, num_val) VALUES ('fghij', NULL);
SELECT fixed_str || num_val::TEXT FROM test_strings WHERE num_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT fixed_str || '678' FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Fixed size string concatenation with integer
